title: Dimorphanthus japonicus
taxonomy: Dimorphanthus japonicus belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the gentian or gentianwort family. Dimorphanthus japonicus is native to East Asia and is a shrub-like plant. The species is characterized by its small, yellow flowers and distinctive leaf structure. Its classification is within the Gentianales order of flowering plants.
